title: Sulfonamides
body_html:
Sulfonamides are a class of antibiotic that work by inhibiting dihydropteroate synthetase

Examples
  • co-trimoxazole
  • trimethoprim

Adverse effects of co-trimoxazole include:
  • Steven-Johnson syndrome

Pharmacology
Antimicrobials
Sulfonamides are a class of antibiotic that work by inhibiting dihydropteroate synthetase

Examples

  • trimethoprim

Adverse effects of co-trimoxazole include:
  • Steven-Johnson syndrome
